revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.
  |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.
  |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.
  |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]]
[[Category:refreshing imported pages]]
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.
  |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]]
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.
  |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]]
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incomplete disambiguation
  |name=From incomplete disambiguation
  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

</noinclude>{{Redirect template

  |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page
  |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incomplete disambiguation |name=From incomplete disambiguation |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation. |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incomplete disambiguation |name=From incomplete disambiguation |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation. |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk page redirects]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incomplete disambiguation |name=From incomplete disambiguation |from=an incomplete disambiguation, a page name that is too ambiguous to be the title of an article or other project page |info=Such titles should redirect to an appropriate disambiguation page (or [[WP:Manual of Style (disambiguation pages)#Grouping by subject area|section]] of it), or to a more complete disambiguation. |all category=Redirects from incomplete disambiguation |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
